我們是世界領先的私人投資公司之一，與我們的投資者、公司和社區合作，創造持久的影響: We are one of the world's leading private investment firms, partnering with our investors, companies, and communities to create lasting impact.

我們真心希望彼此都能成功。我們深知，多元化和包容性的團隊才能帶來卓越的成果。: We are personally invested in each others’ success. We know that great outcomes come from diverse and inclusive teams.
我們思維獨特。我們秉持客觀嚴謹的探究精神，力求在每個機會中發揮最大潛能。我們尊重: We think differently. We bring an objective, rigorous spirit of inquiry to maximize the potential in every opportunity. We respect the power of facts.
我們擼起袖子，埋頭苦幹，每天努力工作，力求更好的成果。我們堅持不懈地攻克難題。我: We roll up our sleeves and dig in, working hard every day to achieve better results. We are persistent in solving problems. We get things done.

我們優勢的核心在於我們的人才。: At the core of our advantage is our people.

公司成立於1984年，最初是一家私人合夥企業，我們致力於培養創新、創業和敏捷的企: Founded in 1984 as a private partnership, we are committed to fostering an innovative, entrepreneurial, and agile culture, empowering employees to own and navigate their career paths. 我們與業界領先專家和高階主管建立了長期穩固的合作關係，這種關係不僅限於公司內部，: We have built long-standing partnerships with industry-leading experts and executives, extending beyond our firm to partners, counterparties, and community organizations. 投資組合公司的管理團隊親身體驗了我們合作共贏的模式。我們以嚴謹的分析方法深入了解: Management teams of our portfolio companies experience our collaborative model firsthand. We use a rigorous analytical approach to understand each company and quickly deploy the right resources to enhance its unique financial, operational, and cultural dynamics. Driven by the belief in 'how good companies become great,' we work closely with management to challenge conventional thinking and pursue scalable improvements during growth and strategic transitions.

我們相信，透過我們自身的特質、價值觀和參與方式，我們可以創造持久且可擴展的影響力: We believe that through our own characteristics, values, and approach to engagement, we can create lasting and scalable impact. We are natural critical thinkers, problem solvers, and practitioners. We believe that addressing the challenges of our time helps us create value and achieve attractive returns. Given the urgency and severity of current global challenges, we are inspired to do more. We are committed to actively managing risks and capturing upside potential, while fulfilling our fiduciary duty and seeking attractive returns for our investors.
我們積極考慮與永續發展相關的因素，並將工作重點放在我們認為能夠產生有意義、可衡量: We actively consider sustainability-related factors and focus our efforts on five key areas where we believe we can drive meaningful, measurable, long-term impact.

公平、尊重地對待員工，營造一種以促進員工安全、福祉和敬業度為核心的環境和文化。: Treating employees fairly and with respect, fostering an environment and culture centered on employee safety, well-being, and engagement.
我們在投資和持有過程中始終以整體視角看待回報，積極管理環境、社會和治理因素，以降: We take a holistic view of returns throughout the investment and ownership lifecycle, actively managing environmental, social, and governance factors to mitigate risk, enhance value creation, and realize attractive returns.
我們以策略性、基於事實的盡職調查為基礎進行投資決策，該調查會考慮廣泛的風險和價值: We base investment decisions on strategic, fact-based due diligence that considers a broad range of risks and value levers, including sustainability-related factors. We seek to comprehensively understand investment opportunities, incorporating strategy, products, services, and business practices. Our investment teams are committed to evaluating key sustainability due diligence findings, bringing material risks and opportunities to the Investment Committee for discussion, and identifying potential sustainability focus areas for post-investment planning and monitoring.
我們相信，將永續發展融入商業策略和負責任的運營，是我們創造價值和發展卓越企業不可: We believe that integrating sustainability into business strategy and responsible operations is an integral part of how we create value and build great companies. Post-investment, we focus on achieving material progress against our core sustainability commitments and enhancing the performance of our companies on specific sustainability factors. As investors and global citizens, we strive to contribute to the environment and society by leveraging the influence of our companies, investments, and employees.

防範詐騙與網路安全警告：貝恩資本及其員工絕不會透過網站或WhatsApp、Tel: Fraud and Cybersecurity Warning: Bain Capital and its employees will never conduct investment activities via websites or instant messaging platforms such as WhatsApp or Telegram, nor will we request any funds or bank account information. Please do not respond to any suspicious text messages, social media messages, emails, or phone calls.
達倫·亞伯拉罕森於2005年加入貝恩資本。他是科技機會團隊的合夥人，負責領導應用: Darren Abrahamson joined Bain Capital in 2005. He is a Partner on the Technology Opportunities team, where he leads investments in application software, infrastructure, cybersecurity, fintech, and healthcare IT. Previously, Darren was the head of the technology vertical within the North America Private Equity team. He has led the firm's recruiting and training efforts and has worked in the Boston and London offices.
達倫在哈佛商學院獲得工商管理碩士學位，並曾是貝克學者。他以最優等成績畢業於賓州大: Darren received an MBA from Harvard Business School, where he was a Baker Scholar. He graduated summa cum laude from the Wharton School at the University of Pennsylvania with a BS in Economics.
阿傑·阿加瓦爾 (Ajay Agarwal) 於 2003 年加入貝恩資本。他是:
Ajay Agarwal joined Bain Capital in 2003. He is a Partner and leads the Venture Capital team's office in the San Francisco Bay Area. Ajay focuses on early-stage application software and SaaS investments. He is passionate about partnering with early-stage entrepreneurs to help them with team building, culture construction, product-market fit iteration, and scaling early go-to-market operations. Ajay's primary investment themes include business enablement, the transformation of sales and marketing functions, and the use of big data and machine learning to transform business applications. In 2012 and 2013, Ajay was named to the Forbes Midas List of the world's top 100 venture capitalists.

Prior to joining Bain Capital, Ajay served as the head of sales and marketing at Trilogy, where under his leadership, annual revenues grew to $300 million. Previously, he was a consultant at McKinsey & Company in their Los Angeles office.
阿傑擁有哈佛商學院的工商管理碩士學位和史丹佛大學的電機工程學士學位。他還擁有“配: Ajay holds an MBA from Harvard Business School and a BS in Electrical Engineering from Stanford University. He also holds a patent for "Method and Apparatus for Configuring Solution."
Ankit Aggarwal 於 2025 年加入貝恩資本。他是合夥人，也是亞太:
Ankit Aggarwal joined Bain Capital in 2025. He is a Partner and a member of the Asia Pacific Private Equity team, focusing on investments in the healthcare and consumer sectors.

Prior to joining Bain Capital, Ankit was a Partner at KKR, focusing on investment opportunities in healthcare, consumer, financial services, and industrials. During his time at KKR, he was deeply involved in investments in Max Healthcare, JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals, Vini Cosmetics, Reliance Retail, Jio Platforms, Infinx, Advanta Seeds, and Five Star Finance. Previously, he was an Associate at Warburg Pincus. He began his career as an investment banker at Ernst & Young.
Ankit 是印度特許會計師協會 (ICAI) 的註冊會計師，擁有德里大學的商學: Ankit is a Chartered Accountant from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) and holds a Bachelor of Commerce from the University of Delhi.
Shakeeb Ahmed 於 2024 年加入貝恩資本。他是合規團隊的副總裁，:
Shakeeb Ahmed joined Bain Capital in 2024. He is a Vice President on the Compliance team, leading the European team.

Prior to joining Bain Capital, Shakeeb worked at Permira Credit, where he was responsible for the implementation of compliance programs. Previously, he worked in the London trading department of Citigroup, providing compliance support for the Global Spread Products business.
Shakeeb 獲得了威斯敏斯特大學國際關係（戰爭與衝突研究方向）的學士學位。: Shakeeb earned a BA in International Relations (War and Conflict Studies) from the University of Westminster.
Anna Alessandria 於 2022 年加入貝恩資本。她是貝恩資本全球:
Anna Alessandria joined Bain Capital in 2022. She is Senior Vice President of Global Human Resources and Head of Compensation and Benefits at Bain Capital.

Prior to joining Bain Capital, Anna was Senior Director of Global Financial Services (GFS) at WTW (Willis Towers Watson). In this role, she led GFS’s asset management practice, focused on expanding WTW’s advisory services to asset managers and other financial services firms. She led complex client projects related to total rewards, pay transparency, and investment professional and executive compensation. Prior to joining WTW, Anna was at MFS Investment Management, where she most recently served as Vice President of Total Rewards.
安娜在維吉尼亞大學獲得文學學士學位，並在波士頓學院獲得工商管理碩士學位。她持有W: Anna received a BA from the University of Virginia and an MBA from Boston College. She holds the Certified Compensation Professional (CCP) designation from WorldatWork.

Tara Allison joined Bain Capital in 2010. She is a Partner on the Credit Restructuring team. Previously, Tara was a member of the Industry Research team, focusing on consumer investments.

Previously, she served as a high-yield credit analyst at Citi Capital Advisors and worked in the Leveraged Portfolio group at Citi Global Markets.
塔拉獲得了里士滿大學的理學學士學位。: Tara earned a BS from the University of Richmond.
格雷森·艾利森於2017年加入貝恩資本。他是流動性及結構性信貸團隊的董事總經理兼:
Grayson Allison joined Bain Capital in 2017. He is a Managing Director and Portfolio Manager on the Liquid and Structured Credit team, primarily responsible for our CLO management business. Previously, he was a member of the Industry Research team and served as the industry head for the building and chemicals sectors.

Prior to joining Bain Capital, he worked at Fidelity and Wells Fargo.
格雷森獲得了北卡羅來納州立大學的文學學士學位。: Grayson earned a BA from North Carolina State University.
Eric Anderson 於 2017 年加入貝恩資本。他是投資組合團隊的合夥:
Eric Anderson joined Bain Capital in 2017. He is a Partner on the Portfolio team and a member of the North America Private Equity team.

Prior to joining Bain Capital, Eric held several leadership roles at Domino's Pizza, most recently as Executive Vice President of International Operations. During his time at Domino's, he was responsible for most of the brand's international markets, international business strategy, international supply chain, and global food safety. Prior to joining Domino's, Eric was a leader in the Bain Corporate Renewal Group, the restructuring arm of Bain & Company, where he participated in holistic business transformation projects across several industries. He also held commercial leadership roles in the information security and building materials industries.
艾瑞克在維吉尼亞大學達頓商學院獲得工商管理碩士學位，並曾是該校的傑諾維斯學者。他: Eric received an MBA from the Darden Graduate School of Business at the University of Virginia, where he was a Genovese Fellow. He also earned a BA from Washington University in St. Louis, where he was a Loewe Scholar.
Patrick Andrews 於 2024 年加入貝恩資本。他是科技機會團隊的:
Patrick Andrews joined Bain Capital in 2024. He is an Associate on the Technology Opportunities team.

我們員工多元化的背景、觀點和觀點營造了充滿活力的工作環境，有助於做出更明智的投資: The diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and viewpoints of our employees create a dynamic work environment that leads to better investment decisions. 我從來沒聽過「我太忙了」這種說法。通常情況下，人們都會說：“好的，我能幫上什麼忙: I’ve never heard the phrase 'I’m too busy.' More often than not, it's 'Okay, how can I help?'

從最基層的助理到最資深的合夥人，每個人的聲音都能被聽見。: From the most junior associate to the most senior partner, everyone's voice is heard.
我為什麼要去別的地方？我知道從第一天起，我就能擁有充分的自主權來做好我的工作，同: Why would I go anywhere else? I knew from day one I’d have the autonomy to do my job, with the backbone of support behind me.
在這裡，如果你對自己的成長歷程負責，你就能接觸到一些最優秀的人才、最前衛的理念和: If you take responsibility for your own trajectory here, you have access to some of the best people, the best thinking, and the best tools.
我很快就明白，最優秀的人每天都非常清楚自己的限制。當你意識到並非所有責任都在自己: I quickly learned that the best people are very clear about their limitations every day. When you realize not all the weight is on you, it takes a lot of pressure off.
投資不僅在於深入了解某個領域，更在於認知到自身知識的限制。自信固然重要，但也要認: Investing isn't just about knowing a field; it’s about knowing the limits of your knowledge. Confidence is key, but so is recognizing your boundaries, collaborating, and staying open-minded.
我們善於傾聽不同的觀點。我們沒有「這就是我們的觀點，僅此而已」的思考模式。我們通: We listen to different perspectives. We don't have a 'this is our view and that's it' mindset. We usually start with a hypothesis and then test it against the facts.
在你職業生涯的早期就能產生影響，而且在整個職業生涯中，你都將成為一個相當小的團隊: You can have an impact early in your career, and throughout it, you’re part of a small team making very significant decisions.
我認為我們文化中一個很棒的元素是，每個人都感到有能力去推動和領導，從而取得我們共: I think a great element of our culture is that everyone feels empowered to push and lead toward the results we all collectively own.
我們不會限制自己能夠產生的影響。: We don’t put a ceiling on the impact we can have.
僅僅因為你一直以來都是以某種方式做事，並不代表這種方式就是正確的。我們一直在尋求: Just because you’ve always done something a certain way doesn't mean it's the right way. We are always looking to evolve and improve.
這是一種深入探究的思考方式，它提出了一系列越來越深刻的問題。它逐漸形成一種思考模: It’s a 'deep dive' mentality that asks a series of increasingly profound questions. It becomes a pattern of thought we seek—to truly look at things from every angle.
我不斷被激勵去做更多、做得更好，這讓我很興奮。很少有人會鼓勵我說：“嘿，你做得很: I’m constantly motivated to do more and be better, which is exciting. It’s rare to be in a place that encourages you by saying, 'Hey, you’re doing great, but let’s keep going.'

此次成功募集體現了貝恩資本全球私募股權平台的實力，該平台兼具規模優勢和差異化投資: The successful fundraise reflects the strength of Bain Capital’s global private equity platform, which combines scale with a differentiated investment strategy, currently managing more than $27 billion across North American, European, and Asian funds.
貝恩資本今日宣布，其最新旗艦私募股權基金－貝恩資本第十四期基金（「第十四期基金」: Bain Capital today announced it has completed fundraising for its latest flagship private equity fund, Bain Capital Fund XIV (“Fund XIV”), reaching a total of $14 billion in capital commitments. This includes approximately $11.8 billion from external investors, exceeding its initial target of $10 billion. Consistent with the firm's model, Bain Capital's affiliated entities committed the remaining capital, becoming the fund's largest single investor.
第十四期基金與近期完成募集的歐洲第六期（2023年）和亞洲第五期（2023年）私: Fund XIV, combined with the recently closed European Fund VI (2023) and Asia Fund V (2023), brings more than $27 billion in committed capital. Bain Capital’s private equity platform manages approximately $68 billion in total assets, combining the scale of a global leader with the flexibility of regional funds and tight collaboration from a globally integrated team. The fundraise reflects ongoing investor trust in a disciplined, stable, and aligned private equity platform with a consistent performance record through multiple cycles.
第十四期基金是貝恩資本全球私募股權業務的最新一期，該業務自1984年以來一直秉持: Fund XIV is the latest vintage of Bain Capital’s global private equity business, which has followed a consistent investment strategy since 1984. For over 40 years, Bain Capital has partnered with management teams to grow and transform businesses by driving operational improvements, unlocking transformative potential, and achieving sustainable scale. The private equity team invests across five core vertical industries—Consumer, Healthcare, Industrials, Services, and Technology—frequently leveraging the broader insights and resources of the Bain Capital platform.
「四十多年來，貝恩資本始終致力於幫助企業充分發揮潛力，即使在複雜的市場環境中也能: “For more than 40 years, Bain Capital’s commitment to helping companies reach their full potential, even in complex market environments, has been the cornerstone of our private equity strategy,” said Chris Gordon, Partner and Co-Head of Global Private Equity.
「我們以成長為導向的投資策略，將全球視野與深厚的行業專長相結合，賦能公司及投資組: “Our growth-oriented investment strategy, which combines a global perspective with deep sector expertise, empowers everyone at the firm and our portfolio companies to achieve transformative growth and sustainable scale. Our platform features a pragmatic, collaborative, and integrated team that is especially well-suited for today’s market environment. With the continued support of our investors and our powerful global platform, Fund XIV will continue to develop as a vital global presence.”
「在當今競爭激烈的環境中，規模龐大而缺乏自律是遠遠不夠的，」貝恩資本北美私募股權: “In today’s competitive landscape, being large without discipline is not enough,” added David Humphrey, Co-Head of North American Private Equity and Partner. “Our strategy remains focused on investment opportunities where Bain Capital can truly make a difference—pairing industry experts with cross-platform insights and the resources of our global team.”
貝恩資本的全球私募股權平台匯集了全球超過330位投資和投資組合專業人士，其中包括: Bain Capital’s global private equity platform brings together more than 330 investment and portfolio professionals worldwide, including a dedicated portfolio team of nearly 90 specialists. This team combines deep industry expertise with specialized capabilities in areas such as digital transformation, supply chain, and talent, working closely with investment and management teams from due diligence through to final exit. This differentiated, hands-on investment model—where approximately 80% of value creation over the last decade has come from operational improvements rather than financial engineering—enables Bain Capital to build sustainable businesses and deliver consistent performance across various market conditions.
貝恩資本成立於1984年，是全球領先的私募股權投資公司之一。我們致力於為投資者、: Bain Capital, LP is one of the world’s leading private multi-asset alternative investment firms that creates lasting impact for our investors, teams, businesses, and the communities in which we live. Since our founding in 1984, we’ve applied our insight and experience to organically expand into several asset classes including private equity, help, credit, public equity, venture capital, and real estate. We leverage our shared platform to capture cross-asset opportunities and strategic advantages. We have 24 offices on four continents, more than 1,850 employees, and approximately $185 billion in assets under management. For more information, please visit
